'''YVH-M-1''' was a [[YVH-M]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that worked with [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] in clearing out a cell of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] infiltrators from [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
